name: Strawberry Preserves with Black Pepper and Balsamic Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 2 cups strawberries (about 1 pint), trimmed and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan, bring all ingredients to a boil, stirring occasionally.
2. Skim any foam from the surface of the liquid.
3. Simmer the mixture, continuing to stir and skim foam as needed, for 15 minutes or until it thickens and becomes translucent.
4. Turn off the heat and allow preserves to cool completely.
5. Store preserves in a covered container in the refrigerator. They will keep for up to one month.
